name: drug_response_screen
description: Drug response screen tables (generic or PRISM) to gene vulnerability programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: response_tsv
inputs.description: Generic long response table with sample_id, drug_id, response

inputs.name: drug_targets_tsv
inputs.description: Drug-to-target table with drug_id, gene_symbol, optional weight/source

inputs.name: prism_treatment_info_csv
inputs.description: PRISM treatment metadata with column_name, broad_id, and target text

inputs.name: prism_cell_line_info_csv
inputs.description: PRISM cell-line metadata with row_name and lineage/tissue annotations

parameters.name: program_preset
parameters.help: Drug-response preset. connectable (default) uses bundle priors/QC when available; broad_pharmacology is lighter-touch.

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label for metadata/GMT naming

parameters.name: response_direction
parameters.help: How raw response direction maps to sensitivity

parameters.name: min_group_size
parameters.help: Skip groups smaller than this size when using group-based contrasts

parameters.name: case_control_within_group
parameters.help: For case_control mode, compute per-group case-vs-control programs

parameters.name: ubiquity_tau
parameters.help: Threshold used by fraction_active ubiquity penalty

parameters.name: max_targets_per_drug
parameters.help: Maximum target count before promiscuity policy applies

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write per-program and root combined GMT outputs

parameters.name: gmt_split_signed
parameters.help: Signed split for contrasts (auto true for group_vs_rest/case_control)

parameters.name: gmt_format
parameters.help: GMT output format (classic is default for downstream compatibility)

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Emit sets smaller than gmt_min_genes (with warning)

parameters.name: drug_blacklist_tsv
parameters.help: Optional list of compounds to exclude

parameters.name: use_compound_qc_bundle
parameters.help: Use compound_qc_human_v1 bundle annotations when available (default: on in connectable preset).

parameters.name: include_blacklisted_compounds
parameters.help: Retain compounds marked drop/pan_toxic in the compound QC bundle.

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional resources directory or extracted bundle root

parameters.name: drug_alias_map_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional drug alias-map bundle resource id

outputs.name: group_qc.tsv
outputs.description: Per-group QC summary including skipped groups and reasons

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.tsv
outputs.description: Selected genes for one drug-response program

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.full.tsv
outputs.description: Full signed score table for one program (optional)
